name: the rough wooden ladle
identity: A basic cooking utensil used for stirring stews and thickened meals, crafted from untreated wood with a rough, functional texture.
current_status: Being used to stir a hearty stew at the cooking fires, then carried to a young hunter who accepts a bowl of food with a gesture of silent acknowledgment.

volatile_state.current_activity: stirring stew and offering food to a hunter
